title: Realization Without Attributes
summary: Realizing the Self without attributes (Nirguna) and beyond mental concepts. Addresses overthinking, mind chatter, and mental noise.

sections.summary: Themes: devotion, mind and meditation, freedom from attachment. The passage moves from “What is the use of invocations and offerings, what is the use of flowers and leaves, what is the use of meditation and mantras? I am the same as…” through “There is no discrimination, no discriminated, no knower and no known. What can I say about coming and going? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.” through “I am not an idiot, I am not a wise. I do not observe silence or non-silence. What can I say about logic and argument? I am not Maya, my nature…”

Themes: action and duty, mind and meditation, freedom from attachment. The passage moves from “I never had a father, mother, family, caste, never born, never die. What can I say of affection and attachments? I am not Maya, my nature is…” through “Know without doubt, I am without suffering, without break, without any imperfection. I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.” through “Where there is no knowledge, verses do not go there. I am involved in the world and I am renounced. I have spoken the ultimate truth.”

verses.sanskrit: नावाहनं नैव विसर्जनं वा पुष्पाणि पत्राणि कथं भवन्ति। ध्यानानि मन्त्राणि कथं भवन्ति समासमं चैव शिवार्चनं च।।१।।
verses.translation: What is the use of invocations and offerings, what is the use of flowers and leaves, what is the use of meditation and mantras? I am the same as Consciousness and it's worshipper.

verses.sanskrit: न केवलं बन्धविबन्धमुक्तो न केवलं शुद्धविशुद्धमुक्तः। न केवलं योगवियोगमुक्तः स वै विमुक्तो गगनोपमोऽहम्।।२।।
verses.translation: I am not only free from bondage and unbounded-ness, I am not only free from purity and impurity, I am not only free from union and separation, I am free from everything, I am like space.

verses.sanskrit: सञ्जायते सर्वमिदं हि तथ्यं सञ्जायते सर्वमिदं वितथ्यम्। एवं विकल्पो मम नैव जातः स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।३।।
verses.translation: Everything is the truth or everything is false, such ignorance does not arise in me. I am not the Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: न साञ्जनं चैव निरञ्जनं वा न चान्तरं वापि निरन्तरं वा। अन्तर्विभिन्नं न हि मे विभाति स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।४।।
verses.translation: I am not perfect and also not imperfect. I am not eternal and also not unceasing. I'm not divided and not undivided. I'm not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: अबोधबोधो मम नैव जातो बोधस्वरूपं मम नैव जातम्। निर्बोधबोधं च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।५।।
verses.translation: I do not have any ignorance or knowledge. Knowledge never arises in me. How can I say about ignorance and knowledge? I'm not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: न धर्मयुक्तो न च पापयुक्तो न बन्धयुक्तो न च मोक्षयुक्तः। युक्तं त्वयुक्तं न च मे विभाति स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।६।।
verses.translation: I do not contain any right conduct or wrong conduct. I do not contain any bondage and liberation. I do not see contents or absence of contents. I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: परापरं वा न च मे कदाचित् मध्यस्थभावो हि न चारिमित्रम्। हिताहितं चापि कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।७।।
verses.translation: Within reach and beyond I am not, nor am I in-between. I do not have enemies or friends. How can I say about benefits or harm? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: नोपासको नैवमुपास्यरूपं न चोपदेशो न च मे क्रिया च। संवित्स्वरूपं च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।८।।
verses.translation: I am not the worshiper, I am not the worshipped, I am not the preaching, I am not the practice. What can I say, I am Consciousness. I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: नो व्यापकं व्याप्यमिहास्ति किञ्चित् न चालयं वापि निरालयं वा। अशून्यशून्यं च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।९।।
verses.translation: There is nothing that is pervaded, nothing that pervades. There is no manifestation or dissolution. What can I say about existence or non-existence? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: न ग्राहको ग्राह्यकमेव किञ्चित् न कारणं वा मम नैव कार्यम्। अचिन्त्यचिन्त्यं च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।१०।।
verses.translation: I am not the perceiver, not the perceived. I am not the cause, not the effect. What can I say about thinkable and unthinkable? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: न भेदकं वापि न चैव भेद्यं न वेदकं वा मम नैव वेद्यम्। गतागतं तात कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।११।।
verses.translation: There is no discrimination, no discriminated, no knower and no known. What can I say about coming and going? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: न चास्ति देहो न च मे विदेहो बुद्धिर्मनो मे न हि चेन्द्रियाणि। रागो विरागश्च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।१२।।
verses.translation: I am not the body, I am not disembodied. I do not have a mind, intellect or senses. What can I say about attachment and detachment? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: उल्लेखमात्रं न हि भिन्नमुच्चै रुल्लेखमात्रं न तिरोहितं वै। समासमं मित्र कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।१३।।
verses.translation: One cannot mention that, which is divided. One cannot mention that, which never appeared. What can I say, my friend, about differences and similarities? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: जितेन्द्रियोऽहं त्वजितेन्द्रियो वा न संयमो मे नियमो न जातः। जयाजयौ मित्र कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।१४।।
verses.translation: I have never conquered the senses, I do not know restraint and rules. What can I say about victory and defeat, my friend? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: अमूर्तमूर्तिर्न च मे कदाचिदा द्यन्तमध्यं न च मे कदाचित्। बलाबलं मित्र कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।१५।।
verses.translation: I am not form or formlessness. I have no start, no middle and no end. What can I say about strength and weakness? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: मृतामृतं वापि विषाविषं च सञ्जायते तात न मे कदाचित्। अशुद्धशुद्धं च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।१६।।
verses.translation: I do not die, I am not immortal. I do not have poison nor am I non-poisonous. These, my son, I do not know. What can I say about pure and impure? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: स्वप्नः प्रबोधो न च योगमुद्रा नक्तं दिवा वापि न मे कदाचित्। अतुर्यतुर्यं च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।१७।।
verses.translation: I do not dream, I do not sleep, I do not wake up, I am not in any yogic state. I do not know day or night. What can I say about transcendental or non-transcendental? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: संविद्धि मां सर्वविसर्वमुक्तं माया विमाया न च मे कदाचित्। सन्ध्यादिकं कर्म कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।१८।।
verses.translation: Know me well as free from everything and nothing. I do not have illusions or reality. What can I say about morning and evening rituals? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: संविद्धि मां सर्वसमाधियुक्तं संविद्धि मां लक्ष्यविलक्ष्यमुक्तम्। योगं वियोगं च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।१९।।
verses.translation: Know me well as always in Samadhi, know me well as free from goals and non-goals. What can I say about union and separation? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: मूर्खोऽपि नाहं न च पण्डितोऽहं मौनं विमौनं न च मे कदाचित्। तर्कं वितर्कं च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।२०।।
verses.translation: I am not an idiot, I am not a wise. I do not observe silence or non-silence. What can I say about logic and argument? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: पिता च माता च कुलं न जातिर् जन्मादि मृत्युर्न च मे कदाचित्। स्नेहं विमोहं च कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।२१।।
verses.translation: I never had a father, mother, family, caste, never born, never die. What can I say of affection and attachments? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: अस्तं गतो नैव सदोदितोऽहं तेजोवितेजो न च मे कदाचित्। सन्ध्यादिकं कर्म कथं वदामि स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।२२।।
verses.translation: I do not come and go. I am always manifested. I do not have light and darkness. What can I say about morning and evening rituals? I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: असंशयं विद्धि नराकुलं माम संशयं विद्धि निरन्तरं माम्। असंशयं विद्धि निरञ्जनं मां स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।२३।।
verses.translation: Know without doubt, I am without suffering, without break, without any imperfection. I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: ध्यानानि सर्वाणि परित्यजन्ति शुभाशुभं कर्म परित्यजन्ति। त्यागामृतं तात पिबन्ति धीराः स्वरूपनिर्वाणमनामयोऽहम्।।२४।।
verses.translation: I have given up meditation. I have given up good and bad actions. I am drinking the nectar of renunciation. I am not Maya, my nature is freedom.

verses.sanskrit: विन्दति विन्दति न हि न हि यत्र छन्दोलक्षणं न हि न हि यत्र। समरसमग्नो भावितपूतः प्रलपति तत्त्वं परमवधूतः।।२५।।
verses.translation: Where there is no knowledge, verses do not go there. I am involved in the world and I am renounced. I have spoken the ultimate truth.
